[cron:6ff07096-2bfb-4c53-9450-9526552fa50b nightly-orphan-cleanup-once] Run a quiet-window cleanup now. Steps: (1) run `openclaw doctor --fix --non-interactive`; (2) run `openclaw doctor --non-interactive`; (3) report whether orphan transcript files were removed and whether any locks remain; (4) if locks still block cleanup, report exact count and recommend next safe window. Keep output concise and actionable.
Current time: Friday, March 13th, 2026 — 11:05 PM (America/Chicago) / 2026-03-14 04:05 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
